message:
feat(abi-tests): expand pthread_once/rwlock_trylock/tsd tests (+10 tests)

- pthread_once: 8→10 (both-null EINVAL, different routine after completion)
- pthread_rwlock_trylock: 8→12 (multiple concurrent reads, unlock transitions,
  interleaved read/write cycles)
- pthread_tsd: 8→12 (many keys unique, overwrite returns latest, null clears,
  double delete EINVAL)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
